title: How to get "I was mentioned"
excerpt:
Hi, 
I want to ask on how to get “I was mentioned” feeds.

posts.author: cjspinner (CJ Cortez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I want to ask on how to get “I was mentioned” feeds.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cjspinner

The API does not allow you to retrieve only your mentions or only your bell icon notification feed.

With that said, you can utilize a webhook to let you know every time a new update is posted to a board. You can then scan that update for your mentions or other relevant data you’re after.

I hope this helps – let me know if you have any questions

Best,
Scott
